zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape是Thomas Fulsnape的女兒，於1460年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 瓦爾迪費爾德。她於1480年與Sir John Edward Coleman在英國素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年在英國素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年77歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape是Thomas Fulsnape的女儿，于1460年出生在英国素福爾可格亞特 瓦爾迪費爾德。她于1480年与Sir John Edward Coleman在英国素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年在英国素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年77岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape was born in 1460, in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England as the daughter of Thomas Fulsnape. She married Sir John Edward Coleman in 1480, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1537, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape est née en 1460, à Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Fulsnape. Elle a épousé Sir John Edward Coleman en 1480, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1537, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape wurde 1460 in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Thomas Fulsnape geboren. Sie hat 1480 in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England Sir John Edward Coleman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1537 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Edward Coleman nel 1480, nel Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnapeは1460年にイギリススフォルクグレアト ワルディングフィールドでThomas Fulsnapeの娘として生まれた。1480年にイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドでSir John Edward Colemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年にイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで77歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape(은)는 1460년 영국 수폴크 그리트 월딩필드에서 Thomas Fulsnape의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 Sir John Edward Coleman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 영국 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape nasceu em 1460, em Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Thomas Fulsnape. Ela casou-se com Sir John Edward Coleman em 1480, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1537, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Fulsnape родилась в 1460 г. в местности грит валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. Её отца звали Thomas Fulsnape. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Edward Coleman в 1480 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1537 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.
